subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished somewhere in the commotion.
source_quote: Akritas noted with unease that their imp guide had vanished somewhere in the commotion

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's instincts screamed at him to stop just before his fingers grazed the second tile.
source_quote: his instincts screaming at him to stop just before his fingers grazed the second tile

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur came to a troubling conclusion that the construct had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone.
source_quote: Felkur studied it carefully and came to a troubling conclusion: the construct had been keyed to recognize Vraxen by scent alone

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur explained with complete sincerity that he had always hated spicy food.
source_quote: He explained, with complete sincerity, that he had always hated spicy food

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur had long carried a device for extracting unwanted flavors.
source_quote: and had long carried a device for extracting unwanted flavors

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was stopped cold by what he found in the Lexicon.
source_quote: what he found stopped him cold

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur had never imagined the consequences of that one drunken evening rippling outward.
source_quote: Felkur had never imagined

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur had learned absolutely nothing from his previous theft.
source_quote: having learned absolutely nothing

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas stared at Felkur in disbelief after he pocketed the Shard.
source_quote: prompting Akritas to stare at him in disbelief

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear shook its head slowly at Felkur's actions.
source_quote: even the Owlbear to shake its head slowly

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur had the clever idea of blaming the Phantom Ghost.
source_quote: Felkur had the clever idea of blaming the Phantom Ghost

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hoped that Vraxen and others would be convinced that the legendary thief had slipped through their fingers again.
source_quote: hoping that Vraxen and others would be convinced that the legendary thief had slipped through their fingers again

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur moved his fingers across the arcane mechanisms with focused precision.
source_quote: his fingers moving across the arcane mechanisms with focused precision

subject: Veris
fact: Veris was visibly injured and furious.
source_quote: the furious voice of a visibly injured High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris
fact: Veris screamed that he would not be framed.
source_quote: screaming that he would not be framed

subject: Veris
fact: Veris screamed that he would have Felkur's head.
source_quote: that he would have Felkur's head

subject: Veris
fact: Veris screamed that he would have his revenge.
source_quote: and that he would have his revenge

subject: Veris
fact: Veris grew increasingly desperate and furious.
source_quote: Veris, growing increasingly desperate and furious

subject: Veris
fact: Veris's eyes burned with rage as he closed the distance to the party.
source_quote: his eyes burning with rage as he closed the distance to the party

subject: The Party
fact: The party realized that Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on them.
source_quote: The party also realized, reading between the lines, that Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party to retrieve the very book they now held in their hands

subject: Veris
fact: Veris shouts threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon.
source_quote: Veris shouting threats of revenge and fury over the forgery left in the Lexicon

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur begins a complex hacking process requiring intense concentration.
source_quote: requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane adjustments over ten rounds

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct
